recentTweets.text: My Tariff Refund Act will provide meaningful relief to Michigan families who have spent the past year paying the price for Trump’s illegal trade wars. Michiganders, not big corporations, deserve to be compensated for what Trump cost them. https://t.co/6CPdlLmIDP

House Republicans' crusade to shut down the Department of Education completely ignores the issues that Michiganders face every day: teacher shortages, a lack of funding for students with disabilities, and a need for more technical education in schools.

We cannot close down the https://t.co/coTTApHfRK

Two people were shot and killed by Trump's out-of-control ICE agents in the last week. It's horrifying and unacceptable.

I'm demanding an independent investigation to bring justice for the victims' families. https://t.co/LG5m3hnlBQ

Donald Trump’s illegal tariffs skyrocketed costs for Michiganders. To this day, they haven’t been compensated for his bad policy.

My Tariff Refund Act would give Michigan families back the money they lost and refocus Congress on supporting hardworking Michiganders, not https://t.co/VP7QiCouai

Today, families across Michigan woke up to some of the worst air quality in the world as wildfire smoke from Canada and northern Minnesota settled over southeast Michigan.

To all Michiganders, we will get through this. https://t.co/WmYbaPasbt

Michiganders paid higher prices on everything because of Trump’s illegal tariffs. Now, corporations are getting refunded instead of the people who deserve it.

Today, I introduced the Tariff Refund Act to return that money to hardworking Michigan families. https://t.co/vL1c1qR18x

Now, we need to do the same thing for our other industries. It’s time to strengthen our domestic supply chains and use our tax code to work for American manufacturing. https://t.co/zNYaHRvkIx

That’s what our Protecting America from Chinese Cars Act is all about. https://t.co/NvzEieiJwt

The connection is clear. RFK Jr. keeps failing our country. He must resign or be impeached, now. https://t.co/qhVc6SJnEj

This is exactly why I wrote the Hold ICE Accountable Act—everyone at ICE, from the bottom to the top, must be held

During my time in the Obama Administration, funding decisions were guided by fairness and transparency, not by who had political connections.

I’ll always fight to make sure our state is heard, and when there’s an opportunity to deliver for Michigan, I get it done. https://t.co/gC3ix8Yamc

Michigan needs to be heard as a manufacturing state, but right now Trump’s not listening. I’m fighting to bring jobs home and put Michigan workers first. https://t.co/ballZjjMuV

Donald Trump has been driving up costs for working families while kicking millions of Americans off food assistance.

It's unacceptable. Every Michigander deserves to be able to put food on their table. Period. https://t.co/qW0yvPjc1H

In Congress, I have always fought for transparency from our elected officials.

I’m not hiding anything. I’ve released my tax returns, and am calling on everyone else to do the same. https://t.co/U4Ib3KFUVP

That’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for Michigan’s families, workers, and innovators. https://t.co/xKRj9oUU9E

When I think of America, I think of Michigan.

From the union workers who built the middle class to Motown and the black artists who shaped American music, Michigan has been the heart of our country for the past 250 years. 

As I look forward to the next 250 years, I know that https://t.co/5xiKNcb47Q
